106	        {static:  ON, tutorials:  ON, tests:  ON, selected_tutorial: NONE}, 
107	        {static: OFF, tutorials: OFF, tests:  ON, selected_tutorial: NONE}, 
108	        {static: OFF, tutorials:  ON, tests: OFF, selected_tutorial: 1},
109	        {static: OFF, tutorials:  ON, tests: OFF, selected_tutorial: 2},
110	        {static: OFF, tutorials:  ON, tests: OFF, selected_tutorial: 3},
111	        {static: OFF, tutorials:  ON, tests: OFF, selected_tutorial: 4},
112	        {static: OFF, tutorials:  ON, tests: OFF, selected_tutorial: 5},
113	        {static: OFF, tutorials:  ON, tests: OFF, selected_tutorial: 6},
114	        {static: OFF, tutorials:  ON, tests: OFF, selected_tutorial: 7},
115	        {static: OFF, tutorials:  ON, tests: OFF, selected_tutorial: 8},
116	        {static: OFF, tutorials:  ON, tests: OFF, selected_tutorial: 9},
117	        {static: OFF, tutorials:  ON, tests: OFF, selected_tutorial: 10},
118	      ]
119	    steps:
120	      - name: Checkout repository
121	        uses: actions/checkout@v1
122	        with:
123	          fetch-depth: 10
124	
125	      - name: Install Ninja
126	        uses: seanmiddleditch/gha-setup-ninja@master
127	
128	      - name: Set env variable for sccache
129	        run: |
130	          echo "appdata=$env:LOCALAPPDATA" >> ${env:GITHUB_ENV}
131	
132	      - name: Cache build
133	        id: cache-build
134	        uses: actions/cache@v4
135	        with:
136	          path: ${{ env.appdata }}\Mozilla\sccache
137	          key: ${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.config }}-${{ matrix.build-params.static }}-cache
138	
139	      - name: Prepare sccache
140	        run: |
141	          iwr -useb 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/scoopinstaller/install/master/install.ps1' -outfile 'install.ps1'
142	          .\install.ps1 -RunAsAdmin
143	          scoop install sccache --global
144	          # Scoop modifies the PATH so we make it available for the next steps of the job
145	          echo "${env:PATH}" >> ${env:GITHUB_PATH}
146	
147	      - name: Configure and build
148	        shell: cmd
149	        run: |
150	          call "C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\2022\Enterprise\Common7\Tools\VsDevCmd.bat" -arch=x64
151	          # https://github.com/eclipse-ecal/ecal/issues/2041
152	          cmake -G Ninja ^
153	            -DCMAKE_POLICY_VERSION_MINIMUM=3.5 ^
154	            -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_LAUNCHER=sccache ^
155	            -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=${{ matrix.config }} ^
156	            -DLIBIGL_USE_STATIC_LIBRARY=${{ matrix.build-params.static }} ^
157	            -DLIBIGL_COPYLEFT_CGAL=ON ^
158	            -DLIBIGL_BUILD_TUTORIALS=${{ matrix.build-params.tutorials }} ^
159	            -DLIBIGL_BUILD_TESTS=${{ matrix.build-params.tests }} ^
160	            -DLIBIGL_GLFW_TESTS=OFF ^
161	            -DLIBIGL_TUTORIALS_CHAPTER1=${{ (matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == 'NONE' || matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == '1') && 'ON' || 'OFF' }} ^
162	            -DLIBIGL_TUTORIALS_CHAPTER2=${{ (matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == 'NONE' || matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == '2') && 'ON' || 'OFF' }} ^
163	            -DLIBIGL_TUTORIALS_CHAPTER3=${{ (matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == 'NONE' || matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == '3') && 'ON' || 'OFF' }} ^
164	            -DLIBIGL_TUTORIALS_CHAPTER4=${{ (matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == 'NONE' || matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == '4') && 'ON' || 'OFF' }} ^
165	            -DLIBIGL_TUTORIALS_CHAPTER5=${{ (matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == 'NONE' || matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == '5') && 'ON' || 'OFF' }} ^
166	            -DLIBIGL_TUTORIALS_CHAPTER6=${{ (matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == 'NONE' || matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == '6') && 'ON' || 'OFF' }} ^
167	            -DLIBIGL_TUTORIALS_CHAPTER7=${{ (matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == 'NONE' || matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == '7') && 'ON' || 'OFF' }} ^
168	            -DLIBIGL_TUTORIALS_CHAPTER8=${{ (matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == 'NONE' || matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == '8') && 'ON' || 'OFF' }} ^
169	            -DLIBIGL_TUTORIALS_CHAPTER9=${{ (matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == 'NONE' || matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == '9') && 'ON' || 'OFF' }} ^
170	            -DLIBIGL_TUTORIALS_CHAPTER10=${{ (matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == 'NONE' || matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == '10') && 'ON' || 'OFF' }} ^
171	            -B build ^
172	            -S .
173	          cmake --build build -j2
174	
175	      - name: Tests
176	        run: cd build; ctest --show-only; ctest --verbose -j2

file.content:
name: Build

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - stable
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
      - stable

env:
  CTEST_OUTPUT_ON_FAILURE: ON
  CTEST_PARALLEL_LEVEL: 2

jobs:
  ####################
  # Linux / macOS
  ####################

  Unix:
    name: ${{ matrix.os }} ${{ fromJSON('["Header-Only", "Static"]')[matrix.build-params.static == 'ON'] }} ${{ matrix.build-params.tutorials == 'ON' && 'tutorial' || ''}} ${{ matrix.build-params.tests == 'ON' && 'tests' || ''}} ${{ matrix.config }}
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        os: [ubuntu-24.04, macos-latest]
        config: [Release]
        build-params: [ {static:  ON, tutorials:  ON, tests:  ON }, {static: OFF, tutorials: OFF, tests:  ON }, {static: OFF, tutorials:  ON, tests: OFF }]
    env:
      IGL_NUM_THREADS: 1  # See https://github.com/libigl/libigl/pull/996
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v1
        with:
          fetch-depth: 10

      - name: Dependencies (Linux)
        if: runner.os == 'Linux'
        run: |
            sudo apt-get update
            sudo apt-get install \
              libblas-dev \
              libglu1-mesa-dev \
              liblapack-dev \
              xorg-dev \
              ccache

      - name: Dependencies (macOS)
        if: runner.os == 'macOS'
        run: |
          HOMEBREW_NO_AUTO_UPDATE=1 brew install ccache

      - name: Setup Xcode version
        if: runner.os == 'macOS'
        uses: maxim-lobanov/setup-xcode@v1
        with:
          xcode-version: '16.3.0'

      - name: Cache Build
        id: cache-build
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.ccache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.config }}-${{ matrix.build-params.static }}-cache

      - name: Prepare ccache
        run: |
          ccache --max-size=1.0G
          ccache -V && ccache --show-stats && ccache --zero-stats

      - name: Configure
        run: |
          mkdir -p build
          cd build
          # https://github.com/eclipse-ecal/ecal/issues/2041
          cmake .. \
            -DCMAKE_POLICY_VERSION_MINIMUM=3.5 \
            -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_LAUNCHER=ccache \
            -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=${{ matrix.config }} \
            -DLIBIGL_USE_STATIC_LIBRARY=${{ matrix.build-params.static }} \
            -DLIBIGL_BUILD_TUTORIALS=${{ matrix.build-params.tutorials }} \
            -DLIBIGL_GLFW_TESTS=OFF \
            -DLIBIGL_BUILD_TESTS=${{ matrix.build-params.tests }} \
            -DLIBIGL_COPYLEFT_CGAL=ON

      - name: Build
        run: cd build; make -j2; ccache --show-stats

      - name: Tests
        run: cd build; ctest --show-only; ctest --verbose

  ####################
  # Windows
  ####################

  Windows:
    name: Windows ${{ fromJSON('["Header-Only", "Static"]')[matrix.build-params.static == 'ON'] }} ${{ matrix.build-params.tutorials == 'ON' && 'tutorial' || ''}} ${{ matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial != 'NONE' && matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial || '' }} ${{ matrix.build-params.tests == 'ON' && 'tests' || ''}} ${{ matrix.config }}
    runs-on: windows-2022
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        config: [Release]
        build-params: [ 
        {static:  ON, tutorials:  ON, tests:  ON, selected_tutorial: NONE}, 
        {static: OFF, tutorials: OFF, tests:  ON, selected_tutorial: NONE}, 
        {static: OFF, tutorials:  ON, tests: OFF, selected_tutorial: 1},
        {static: OFF, tutorials:  ON, tests: OFF, selected_tutorial: 2},
        {static: OFF, tutorials:  ON, tests: OFF, selected_tutorial: 3},
        {static: OFF, tutorials:  ON, tests: OFF, selected_tutorial: 4},
        {static: OFF, tutorials:  ON, tests: OFF, selected_tutorial: 5},
        {static: OFF, tutorials:  ON, tests: OFF, selected_tutorial: 6},
        {static: OFF, tutorials:  ON, tests: OFF, selected_tutorial: 7},
        {static: OFF, tutorials:  ON, tests: OFF, selected_tutorial: 8},
        {static: OFF, tutorials:  ON, tests: OFF, selected_tutorial: 9},
        {static: OFF, tutorials:  ON, tests: OFF, selected_tutorial: 10},
      ]
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v1
        with:
          fetch-depth: 10

      - name: Install Ninja
        uses: seanmiddleditch/gha-setup-ninja@master

      - name: Set env variable for sccache
        run: |
          echo "appdata=$env:LOCALAPPDATA" >> ${env:GITHUB_ENV}

      - name: Cache build
        id: cache-build
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ${{ env.appdata }}\Mozilla\sccache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.config }}-${{ matrix.build-params.static }}-cache

      - name: Prepare sccache
        run: |
          iwr -useb 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/scoopinstaller/install/master/install.ps1' -outfile 'install.ps1'
          .\install.ps1 -RunAsAdmin
          scoop install sccache --global
          # Scoop modifies the PATH so we make it available for the next steps of the job
          echo "${env:PATH}" >> ${env:GITHUB_PATH}

      - name: Configure and build
        shell: cmd
        run: |
          call "C:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\2022\Enterprise\Common7\Tools\VsDevCmd.bat" -arch=x64
          # https://github.com/eclipse-ecal/ecal/issues/2041
          cmake -G Ninja ^
            -DCMAKE_POLICY_VERSION_MINIMUM=3.5 ^
            -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_LAUNCHER=sccache ^
            -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=${{ matrix.config }} ^
            -DLIBIGL_USE_STATIC_LIBRARY=${{ matrix.build-params.static }} ^
            -DLIBIGL_COPYLEFT_CGAL=ON ^
            -DLIBIGL_BUILD_TUTORIALS=${{ matrix.build-params.tutorials }} ^
            -DLIBIGL_BUILD_TESTS=${{ matrix.build-params.tests }} ^
            -DLIBIGL_GLFW_TESTS=OFF ^
            -DLIBIGL_TUTORIALS_CHAPTER1=${{ (matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == 'NONE' || matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == '1') && 'ON' || 'OFF' }} ^
            -DLIBIGL_TUTORIALS_CHAPTER2=${{ (matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == 'NONE' || matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == '2') && 'ON' || 'OFF' }} ^
            -DLIBIGL_TUTORIALS_CHAPTER3=${{ (matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == 'NONE' || matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == '3') && 'ON' || 'OFF' }} ^
            -DLIBIGL_TUTORIALS_CHAPTER4=${{ (matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == 'NONE' || matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == '4') && 'ON' || 'OFF' }} ^
            -DLIBIGL_TUTORIALS_CHAPTER5=${{ (matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == 'NONE' || matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == '5') && 'ON' || 'OFF' }} ^
            -DLIBIGL_TUTORIALS_CHAPTER6=${{ (matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == 'NONE' || matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == '6') && 'ON' || 'OFF' }} ^
            -DLIBIGL_TUTORIALS_CHAPTER7=${{ (matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == 'NONE' || matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == '7') && 'ON' || 'OFF' }} ^
            -DLIBIGL_TUTORIALS_CHAPTER8=${{ (matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == 'NONE' || matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == '8') && 'ON' || 'OFF' }} ^
            -DLIBIGL_TUTORIALS_CHAPTER9=${{ (matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == 'NONE' || matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == '9') && 'ON' || 'OFF' }} ^
            -DLIBIGL_TUTORIALS_CHAPTER10=${{ (matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == 'NONE' || matrix.build-params.selected_tutorial == '10') && 'ON' || 'OFF' }} ^
            -B build ^
            -S .
          cmake --build build -j2

      - name: Tests
        run: cd build; ctest --show-only; ctest --verbose -j2

- runs-on: ubuntu-24.04
- config: Release
- build-params: {static: ON, tutorials: ON, tests: ON}

The key steps for this job are:
1. Dependencies (Linux):
   - apt-get update
   - apt-get install libblas-dev, libglu1-mesa-dev, liblapack-dev, xorg-dev, ccache

2. Prepare ccache:
   - ccache --max-size=1.0G
   - ccache -V && ccache --show-stats && ccache --zero-stats

3. Configure:
   - mkdir -p build && cd build
   - cmake with specific options:
     - CMAKE_POLICY_VERSION_MINIMUM=3.5
     - CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_LAUNCHER=ccache
     - CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release
     - DLIBIGL_USE_STATIC_LIBRARY=ON
     - DLIBIGL_BUILD_TUTORIALS=ON
     - DLIBIGL_GLFW_TESTS=OFF
     - DLIBIGL_BUILD_TESTS=ON
     - DLIBIGL_COPYLEFT_CGAL=ON

4. Build:
   - cd build; make -j2; ccache --show-stats

5. Tests:
   - cd build; ctest --show-only; ctest --verbose

The env variables are:
- CTEST_OUTPUT_ON_FAILURE: ON
- CTEST_PARALLEL_LEVEL: 2
- IGL_NUM_THREADS: 1

Now let me write the Dockerfile and run.sh. I need to use ubuntu-24.04 (or a compatible Ubuntu version). Let me check what's available. 

I'll use ubuntu:24.04 as the base image. The Dockerfile needs to install build tools (cmake, make, g++, git), project dependencies (libblas-dev, libglu1-mesa-dev, liblapack-dev, xorg-dev, ccache), set DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive to avoid interactive prompts, clone or copy the repo, set the environment variables, and execute run.sh.

Perfect! Now I understand the job. It's an "ubuntu-24.04 Static tutorial tests Release" job with specific CMake configuration. Let me write the Dockerfile and run.sh:

**PHASE 2: Write Dockerfile and run.sh**

input.content:
FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV CTEST_OUTPUT_ON_FAILURE=ON
ENV CTEST_PARALLEL_LEVEL=2
ENV IGL_NUM_THREADS=1

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    build-essential \
    cmake \
    git \
    ccache \
    libblas-dev \
    libglu1-mesa-dev \
    liblapack-dev \
    xorg-dev \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app
COPY repo/ /app/

RUN ccache --max-size=1.0G && \
    ccache -V && \
    ccache --show-stats && \
    ccache --zero-stats

RUN mkdir -p build && \
    cd build && \
    cmake .. \
    -DCMAKE_POLICY_VERSION_MINIMUM=3.5 \
    -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_LAUNCHER=ccache \
    -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release \
    -DLIBIGL_USE_STATIC_LIBRARY=ON \
    -DLIBIGL_BUILD_TUTORIALS=ON \
    -DLIBIGL_GLFW_TESTS=OFF \
    -DLIBIGL_BUILD_TESTS=ON \
    -DLIBIGL_COPYLEFT_CGAL=ON

COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]
